_translated_editions.name: The White Edition
_translated_editions.description: Get ready for an extraordinary taste experience. The Red Bull White Edition with the taste of exotic coconut and fruity blueberry.

_translated_editions.name: The Sea Blue Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Juneberry Edition with the enticing berry taste of Juneberry. Red Bull The Sea Blue Edition gives you Wings with the enticing berry taste.

_translated_editions.name: The Pink Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: The Energy Drink with the taste of raspberry and other fruits complemented by exciting herbal notes of verbena.

_translated_editions.name: The Spring Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Spring Edition gives you Wings with the taste of cherry and floral notes of sakura and almond.

_translated_editions.name: The Lilac Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Lilac Edition with the taste of pink grapefruit, herbal woodruff, and floral notes.

_translated_editions.name: The Peach Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Peach Edition Sugarfree offers the taste of white peach with a touch of citrus peel and floral notes.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by top athletes, busy professionals, university students and travellers on long journeys.

_translated_editions.name: The Blue Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Blue Edition. A classic, with the fruity taste of blueberry.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: Wings without sugars: Red Bull Sugarfree is Red Bull Energy Drink without sugars.

_translated_editions.name: The Peach Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Peach Edition offers the taste of white peach with a touch of citrus peel and floral notes.

_translated_editions.name: The Purple Edition
_translated_editions.description: Experience the unique taste of exotic Acai Berry. The Red Bull Purple Edition

_translated_editions.name: The Apricot Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Apricot Edition offers the perfect blend of apricot and strawberry with a touch of peach taste.
